title: ANGIX Plastic Mixing Bowls Set - 15cm Multipurpose Fruit Bowl, Mixing Bowl, Pasta Bowls - Microwave & Dishwasher Safe, Ideal for Mixing & Serving
features: Durability and Safety: Crafted from resilient materials, these 15cm plastic mixing bowls are microwave and dishwasher safe, providing a versatile solution for both mixing and serving. Use them as an alternative to pyrex dish with lid or food storage containers with lids.

Durable Food Mixers for Baking: These plastic mixing bowls for baking serve as reliable food mixers for baking with bowl, enhancing your kitchen tools collection. Their durable build ensures longevity and ease of use in any baking set or kitchen aid.

Microwave and Dishwasher Safe: Designed for convenience, these mixing bowls are compatible with both white microwave use and dishwasher cleaning. Ideal as mixing bowls or food prep containers with lids, they simplify food preparation and clean-up processes.

Multipurpose Mixing Bowls: Our 15cm plastic bowls serve multiple purposes, from being a salad bowl to a cereal bowl. These mixing bowls cater to various needs, functioning as soup bowls or food storage containers, adding efficiency to everyday kitchen tasks.

Compact and Efficient Design: These bowls are compact enough for small microwaves and efficient in design, making them perfect for a quick salad bowl or cereal bowl. Their versatile use and stackable design ensure effective storage in any kitchen environment.
